config.Enable_ReallyMixedSeeds.name: Enable: Really Mixed Seeds
config.Enable_ReallyMixedSeeds.desc: Allow mixed seeds to become any in-season crop.
config.Enable_ReallyMixedFlowerSeeds.des: Allow mixed flower seeds to become any in-season flower.
config.Enable_SeedMakerUnmixes.name: Enable: Seed Maker Unmixes Seeds
config.Enable_SeedMakerUnmixes.desc: Mixed seeds and mixed flower seeds can be unmixed by the seed maker
